features.name: Foundation
features.description: Project setup, design system, theme, database schema, core services (AI provider, notifications, background tasks), Riverpod setup, error handling

features.name: Agenda Module
features.description: Event data model, persistent agenda strip, calendar view, event CRUD, day timeline, categories (Personal/Work/Practice), state management, tests

features.name: Practice / Wills Module
features.description: Skill (Will) data model, first-launch prompt, skill cards, session logging, streak calculation, unanchored session flagging, pattern detection, tests

features.name: AI Layer
features.description: Claude API integration, context builder (agenda + wills + sessions payload), persistent chat UI, quick command dropdown, offline degradation, tests

features.name: Proactive System
features.description: Suggestion storage, SuggestionEngine, background workmanager task, 8pm daily notification, in-app confirmation UI, tests

features.name: Polish & Resilience
features.description: Light mode, micro-animations, empty states, accessibility (semantic labels, contrast), locale formatting (XOF currency, DD/MM/YYYY), performance profiling, integration tests, Sunday reflection, settings screen

lifecycle.releaseThreshold: All MVP epics must reach VERIFIED before shipping
